name: Docs
description: Prompt-first documentation recipe. Designed for teaching humans how to work with AI. Features accordion navigation with glow states, Cmd+K search, right-side TOC with scroll spy, and mobile-responsive hamburger menu. Auradecantism styling with glass effects and gradients, but information-dense.

decorators.docs-nav-active: Active navigation item with primary color glow. Use on current page links.
decorators.docs-callout-tip: Tip callout with primary color accent. For helpful hints and best practices.
decorators.docs-callout-warning: Warning callout with amber accent. For important caveats.
decorators.docs-callout-info: Info callout with blue accent. For additional context.
decorators.docs-code-block: Code block with glass effect and copy button. For code examples.
decorators.docs-prompt-box: Prompt example box with gradient border. For AI prompt demonstrations.

shell.description: Docs layout with sidebar, content, and optional TOC.

sidebar.description: Accordion navigation with search trigger and glow active states.
sidebar.example:
import { DocsSidebar } from 'decantr/patterns';

DocsSidebar({ onSearch: () => openCommandPalette() })

toc.description: Right-side table of contents with scroll spy.

command-palette.description: Cmd+K search overlay with keyboard navigation.

callout.description: Styled callout for tips, warnings, and info.

code-block.description: Code block with language label and copy button.
